title: excoecaria stenophylla
intro: Excoecaria stenophylla, also known as the poisonous tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The extracts from the plant have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The plant is typically prepared in herbal form through infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine, but caution should be taken due to its toxic nature.
